description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. Define a global variable EXTERNAL_REGISTRY=docker.io and a cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores the image/ directory. Include a before_script that runs: apk add bash curl git; mkdir -p /builds/$CI_PROJECT_PATH/mnt; mkdir -p ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/image; mkdir ~/.docker; chmod 700 ~/.docker; cp ${CONFIG_JSON} ~/.docker/config.json. Define three stages: build, test, deploy. Add a build job in the build stage that runs only on branches and executes "bash -x pipeline/pipeline-entry.sh". Add a test job in the test stage that also runs only on branches and executes the same script. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch and executes the same script.
